name: Heraklion
description: Heraklion is a Crete town page in the My Second Country evidence atlas. It publishes cited screening data, inherited national context, local proxies, and visible source gaps for the town. It is not advice.

priceLevelIndexEU27.sourceName: Eurostat, price level index for actual individual consumption (tec00120, EU27=100)
priceLevelIndexEU27.excerpt: Greece price level index for actual individual consumption (EU27 = 100): 87.4 in 2025 (100 = EU average).

averageAnnualSunHours.excerpt: Athens: about 2,773 mean annual sunshine hours (Elliniko station).

koppenClass.sourceName: GloH2O Koppen-Geiger climate classification (Beck et al. 2023)
koppenClass.excerpt: Koppen-Geiger class Csa, hot-summer Mediterranean, is recorded here as the provisional Crete parent class pending the region geospatial build.

digitalNomadVisa.sourceName: Hellenic Ministry of Migration and Asylum, digital nomad residence permit (Migration Code, Law 5038/2023)
digitalNomadVisa.excerpt: Greece digital nomad residence permit: minimum net monthly income 3,500 euros, plus 20 percent for a spouse and 15 percent per child.

headlinePersonalIncomeTaxRate.sourceName: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries, Greece, taxes on personal income
headlinePersonalIncomeTaxRate.excerpt: Top marginal personal income tax rate 44 percent on income above 60,000 euros (scale 9, 20, 26, 34, 39, 44 percent).

nearest_airport.value: Heraklion International Nikos Kazantzakis Airport (HER/LGIR), large_airport
nearest_airport.sourceName: OurAirports, Heraklion International Nikos Kazantzakis Airport record
nearest_airport.excerpt: LGIR, large_airport, Heraklion International Nikos Kazantzakis Airport, municipality Heraklion, IATA HER.

airport_drive_minutes.value: OSRM route proxy from Heraklion town point to Heraklion International Nikos Kazantzakis Airport (HER/LGIR): 7.9 minutes, 5.5 km.
airport_drive_minutes.sourceName: OSRM public routing table over OpenStreetMap-derived road graph, Heraklion point to Crete airport points
airport_drive_minutes.excerpt: OSRM table returned Heraklion to HER 7.9 minutes and 5.5 km; JSH was 133.3 minutes and CHQ was 172.9 minutes.

bus_frequency_proxy.value: 12 weekday outbound spine departures from Heraklion, counting 5 Heraklion-Rethymno-Chania services plus 7 Heraklion-Agios Nikolaos services. Selected corridor: Heraklion westbound to Rethymno/Chania and eastbound to Agios Nikolaos.
bus_frequency_proxy.excerpt: The KTEL Heraklion-Lasithi FAQ lists Monday-Friday Heraklion-Rethymno-Chania departures at 7:30, 11:30, 14:30, 17:30, 20:30 and Heraklion-Agios Nikolaos departures at 7:30, 10:00, 12:00, 14:00, 15:45, 17:45, 19:45.

blue_flag_beaches.sourceName: Blue Flag Greece, 2026 awarded beaches list
blue_flag_beaches.excerpt: English official awards list has HERAKLION R.U. [37]. No Heraklion Municipality beach section is used for this row.
